song.title: Whenever the Heart shall turn
song.author: 2nd Corinthians 3:16-17
song.lyrics:
[v1] Whenever the heart shall turn to the Lord The veil shall be taken away
So turn your heart to the Lord all the day, And the veil shall be taken away.
Now the Lord is that Spirit, And where the Spirit of the Lord is, There is liberty - such liberty!
Whenever the heart shall turn to the Lord The veil shall be taken away
